title: Phunware Inc (NASDAQ:PHUN) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Phunware Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript. Earnings Performance: Phunware beat earnings expectations with reported EPS of -$0.06 versus expected -$0.07. Financial Highlights: Net revenues: $3.5 million. Platform revenue: 37% ($1.3 million). Hardware revenue: 63% ($2.2 million). Gross margin: 13.1% (down from 27.7% year-over-year). Net loss: $6.5 million (-$0.06 per share). Major Developments: CEO Russell Buyse highlighted several strategic initiatives: Welcomed Thumper Pond Resort as a new hospitality customer. Exhibited at HITEC (Hospitality Industry Technology Exposition) in Toronto, generating 50+ qualified leads. Made progress on mapping and engagement product modules. Launched Lyte workstation offerings for gamers. Organizational Changes: New CFO Troy Reisner reported significant cost-reduction measures: Reduced workforce by approximately 33% across all departments with expected annual savings of up to $5 million. Liquidated remaining digital assets. Allowed $2.8 million in warrants to expire. Closing cash position: $1.1 million.
